category_sources: Official Blueprint documentation describes blueprint-compiler as a build tool converting Blueprint UI definitions to GTK-readable XML.
source_facts.description says Blueprint Compiler is a markup language and compiler for GTK 4 user interfaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is blueprint-compiler; official GNOME documentation page title uses Blueprint documentation for blueprint-compiler.
docs_sources: Official documentation contains setup, syntax reference, packaging, and linter sections.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME Pages documentation site.
repo_sources: Official Blueprint setup documentation gives the wrap-git URL as gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/blueprint-compiler.git.
tags_sources: Official Blueprint packaging docs mention compiler usage and the Blueprint language server.
source_facts.description identifies GTK 4 UI markup and compiler functionality.
